steps.assistant_text: Sibling of func_80008C30 (kernel_022_d, -O1, 0x94 / 37 insns): same RSP/RDP command-emit shape (6-bit x from a0 into byte0 bits 2-7, 5-bit y from a1 into byte1 bits 0-4) but packs a 3rd field z into byte2: target does lb byte2; andi 0xff07; ori 0x20; sb -- i.e. byte2 = (byte2 & 0x07) | 0x20. Modeled z as an int bitfield at byte2 bits 3-7 (int z:5; int b2lo:3) set to 4, so (4<<3)=0x20. Same two levers as the sibling: INT bitfields (no char 8-bit sign-truncation) + union { struct bits; s32 w; } overlay for the single sw-zero init and the direct-frame word read at -O1. build/.o vs expected/.o: 37 insns / 0x94 bytes byte-identical. Full make clean && make ROM byte-identical to baserom (cmp clean; sha1 79cd1166c365e5809dec9b62e6d40d6032d5db3a; make verify OK). Kernel link-direct, real symbols.
